name: Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae
desc: Dan Heng's true form from his Vidyadhara lineage carries the residual power left behind by his past incarnation, the Imbibitor Lunae.\nUpon accepting the majestic horns atop his crown, he must accept all the merits and faults attributed to that sinner.

1.name: Tethered to Sky
1.desc: Increases the stackable Righteous Heart count by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, and gains 1 extra stack of Righteous Heart for each hit during an attack.

2.name: Imperium On Cloud Nine
2.desc: After using his Ultimate, Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's <u>action advances</u> by <unbreak>100%</unbreak> and gains 1 extra "Squama Sacrosancta."

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

3.name: Clothed in Clouds
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Zephyr's Bliss
4.desc: The <u>buff</u> effect granted by "Outroar" lasts until the end of this unit's next turn.

10000009.name: Buff
10000009.desc: All status effects that provide beneficial combat buffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

5.name: Fall is the Pride
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Reign, Returned
6.desc: After another ally character uses their Ultimate, the Imaginary <u>RES PEN</u> of Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's next "Fulgurant Leap" attack increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. This effect can stack up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s).

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

121301.name: Beneficent Lotus
121301.desc: Uses a 2-hit attack and deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's ATK to one designated enemy target.
121301.simple_desc: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to one enemy.

121302.name: Dracore Libre
121302.desc:
Enhances Basic ATK. Enhancements may be applied up to 3 times consecutively. Using this ability does not consume Skill Points and is not considered as using a Skill.
Enhanced once, Beneficent Lotus becomes Transcendence.
Enhanced twice, Beneficent Lotus becomes Divine Spear.
Enhanced thrice, Beneficent Lotus becomes Fulgurant Leap.
When using Divine Spear or Fulgurant Leap, starting from the fourth hit, 1 stack of Outroar is gained before every hit. Each stack of Outroar increases Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color>, for a max of <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> stacks. These stacks last until the end of his turn.
121302.simple_desc: Enhances the Basic ATK Beneficent Lotus to <color=#f29e38ff>Transcendence</color>, <color=#f29e38ff>Divine Spear</color>, or <color=#f29e38ff>Fulgurant Leap</color>.

121303.name: Azure's Aqua Ablutes All
121303.desc: Uses a 3-hit attack and deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's ATK to one designated enemy target. At the same time, deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's ATK to adjacent targets. Then, obtains <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> "Squama Sacrosancta."\nIt's possible to hold up to <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> "Squama Sacrosancta," which can be used to offset Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's consumption of skill points. Consuming "Squama Sacrosancta" is considered equivalent to consuming skill points.
121303.simple_desc: Deals massive Imaginary DMG to one enemy, deals Imaginary DMG to adjacent targets, and gains 2 "Squama Sacrosancta," which can <color=#f29e38ff>offset</color> Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's <color=#f29e38ff>consumption of skill points</color>. Consuming Squama Sacrosancta is considered equivalent to consuming skill points.

121304.name: Righteous Heart
121304.desc: After each hit dealt during an attack, Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae gains 1 stack of Righteous Heart, increasing his DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color>. This effect can stack up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s), lasting until the end of his turn.
121304.simple_desc: Increases DMG for every hit dealt. This effect is stackable and lasts until the end of this character's turn.

121306.name: Attack
121306.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

121307.name: Heaven-Quelling Prismadrakon
121307.desc: After using his Technique, Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae enters the Leaping Dragon state for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> seconds. While in the Leaping Dragon state, using his attack enables him to move forward rapidly for a set distance, attacking all enemies he touches and blocking all incoming attacks. After entering combat via attacking enemies in the Leaping Dragon state, Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae deals Imaginary DMG equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of his ATK to all enemies, and gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Squama Sacrosancta.
121307.simple_desc: Enters the Leaping Dragon state. Attacking will cause this character to move forward rapidly for a set distance and attack all enemies touched. After entering combat via attacking enemies, deals Imaginary DMG to all enemies, and gains 1 Squama Sacrosancta.

121308.name: Transcendence
121308.desc: Uses a 3-hit attack and deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's ATK to one designated enemy target.
121308.simple_desc: Unleashes <color=#f29e38ff>3 hits</color> in this attack and deals Imaginary DMG to one enemy target.

121310.name: Divine Spear
121310.desc: Uses a 5-hit attack and deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's ATK to one designated enemy target. From the fourth hit onward, simultaneously deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's ATK to adjacent targets.
121310.simple_desc: Unleashes <color=#f29e38ff>5 hits</color> in this attack to deal massive Imaginary DMG to one enemy and minor Imaginary DMG to adjacent targets. For each of the last 2 hits, obtains 1 stack of "Outroar" just before the hit, increasing CRIT DMG.

121312.name: Fulgurant Leap
121312.desc: Uses a 7-hit attack and deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's ATK to one designated enemy target. From the fourth hit onward, simultaneously deal Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae's ATK to adjacent targets.
121312.simple_desc: Unleashes <color=#f29e38ff>7 hits</color> in this attack to deal massive Imaginary DMG to one enemy and Imaginary DMG to adjacent targets. For each of the last 4 hits, obtains 1 stack of "Outroar" just before the hit, increasing CRIT DMG.

1.point_desc: At the start of the battle, immediately regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.
Increases the chance to resist <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000011.name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominance, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock, Happiness Puppet, Grudge Ablaze.

1.point_desc: When dealing DMG to enemy targets with Imaginary Weakness, CRIT DMG increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
